description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle operating in manual mode was eastbound on Frederick Street and turning right onto Buena Vista Avenue in San Francisco 
when the front wheel on the driver's side struck a traffic island to the left side of the vehicle. The wheel rim was damaged as a result of the 
interaction. There were no reported injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
